explanations.8: extra_hosts lets this container access custom hostnames (like my_site.local) by mapping them to IP addresses, similar to adding entries to your /etc/hosts file.
explanations.10: This line maps the hostname 'my_site.local' to the IP address 172.20.0.1, so when code inside the container tries to reach my_site.local, it will connect to that IP instead.
explanations.14: external: true means this network already exists outside this Docker Compose file, so Docker won't try to create it—it will just connect to an existing one.
